title: Merl
description: Adds Merl and her workshop into your game. Complete with gun
body:
Adds Merl and her workshop into the game

![Merl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c76cdecd288ed578a50aab250af33afe043ecd2.png)

Merl has gun

<details>
<summary>Some Extra Info</summary>

- Merl spawns in every land biome
- Merl has one health point
- Her workshop also spawns in every land biome including in the nether and end
- Merl has gun

</details>
